text: Being here, I feel a blend of curiosity and introspection. The sterile, modern environment outside stands in contrast to the colorful, information-rich installation within. Stepping into the R+D space feels like crossing an invisible threshold—one where I’m invited not just to observe, but to reflect on the convergence of technology, research, and human experience. The subtle hum of screens, the careful curation of words and objects, all prompt a contemplative mood. I am quietly excited to engage with ideas about coexistence and innovation, and I feel a subtle sense of belonging in a space devoted to thoughtful exploration.
